summary: Tested new 'Continua sul Telefono' feature: backend agent magic-link/QR endpoints + cross-device notification. 17/17 backend tests pass (serial mode). Frontend flow: modal opens, QR renders, countdown works, Rigenera works, polling detects consume within ~2s, 'Device connesso: Android' shown + success toast visible. BUG: modal does NOT auto-close after 2.2s as intended.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal does not auto-close after successful consume. The polling useEffect calls setState('consumed') which triggers the effect cleanup (sets local `cancelled = true`), so the scheduled setTimeout closure that calls onClose() sees cancelled===true and no-ops. Modal stays on screen indefinitely until user clicks X/overlay.

action_items: Fix MobileHandoffModal auto-close: move the setTimeout(onClose,2200) OUTSIDE the polling effect (e.g., use a separate useEffect keyed on `state === 'consumed'`) so the cleanup running when state changes does not cancel the auto-close timer. Alternative: use a ref for `cancelled` that only flips on unmount, not on every state change.

Consider serializing rate-limit-sensitive tests in pytest by moving them to a single module and using -n0 in CI, OR by scoping cleanup fixture to module-level instead of function-level, OR by using unique user per test. Right now the mandatory `-n 2 --dist loadscope` in pytest.ini causes cross-worker DB races because each test wipes db.magic_tokens between tests.
critical_code_review_comments: MobileHandoffModal.jsx L47-64: setTimeout in polling effect shares `cancelled` closure with cleanup -> auto-close is racy and effectively broken (bug above).

auth.py: consume-magic single-use is enforced via find_one_and_update on {used:false} — good. However the same token is returned as 'used' by magic-status forever with no cleanup TTL index; consider a TTL index on magic_tokens.expires_at for hygiene.

routers/pc.py agent_magic_link uses os.environ.get('FRONTEND_URL','') with fallback; if FRONTEND_URL unset in prod, mobile_url would become '/auth/mobile?t=...' (relative) which desktop GUI cannot open. Consider raising early or asserting.

MobileHandoffModal L38-43: countdown effect resets state to 'idle' when remaining hits 0, but never sets remaining back; the subsequent branch checks `state === 'idle' && remaining === 0 && magicUrl` — this is fine but should also clear polling explicitly.
seed_data_creation: None. Test suite auto-cleans db.magic_tokens between tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite must be run with `-n 0` because /app/backend/pytest.ini forces -n 2 which causes cross-worker races (each test's autouse cleanup wipes db.magic_tokens). All 17 tests PASS serially. Frontend: verify auto-close after main agent fixes the setTimeout closure bug in MobileHandoffModal.jsx.
